title: DromaDiag: Modding Diagnostic Tool
author: Mur
description:
A low-level diagnostic toolkit for Caves of Qud modders. Dump type hierarchies, inspect live MonoBehaviour fields, audit Harmony patches, and extract precise RectTransform layout data directly from the game engine.

Usage: Use the 'Wish' command in-game (e.g., 'dromadiag:harmony').
Output: AppData/LocalLow/Freehold Games/CavesOfQud/DromaDiag.txt
